title: Deep Dig
short_description: The mine is a giant number line — dig and climb to the exact level, or end up in a lava pocket with a bat in your helmet.
description: Grab your helmet — we're going DOWN. The mine is a giant vertical number line: the surface is 0, the sky is plus, and the deep dark is minus. Read each task and tap the exact level on the blocky mine shaft — dig to the wrong depth and you hit a lava pocket, or a bat moves into your helmet. Grade bands ramp from simple how-deep counting (0–10), to crossing zero between +3 and −5, to the full +4 to −12 range with two-step moves and how-far-apart distance questions. A free online negative numbers and number line game for kids in grades 1–5, with streak bonuses feeding your score and GP.
controls: Mouse / tap the level on the mine shaft where you end up; some questions use answer buttons.
